tasks.label: xcodebuild: example
tasks.command: xcodebuild -workspace Sogiza.xcworkspace -scheme Sogiza -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 11,OS=14.4' build
